rationale: Hard pass — this archetype is licensed Dragon Ball Z anime IP (Goku SSJ3 Dragon Fist), which creates immediate legal/trademark risk and zero authentic ties to Knock'em All's minimalist 3D physics-shooter DNA. The dark anime palette (gold/navy/indigo) and shonen action audience clash with the game's bright pastel, broad-casual, calm/satisfying tone, and a charged-punch dragon attack has no analog to tap-to-shoot ball physics. Skip entirely; if the team wants a "satisfaction · animation" angle, brief a clean knockdown-chain montage with the toy gun and dummies instead.
